goal: 迁移 eval fixture 到 explicit signal 模型

summary.title: 迁移 eval fixture 到 explicit signal 模型
summary.what: 将 eval substrate、fixture、CLI wire-up 和结果文档从 legacy summary.anti_patterns 期望迁移到当前 explicit signal 模型。Fixture 现在用 explicit constraints 表达硬规则，用 lifecycle status 表达 abandoned / superseded / stale 历史，用普通 decisions 表达当前实现选择；scorer 改为按 signal kind 匹配 explicit constraint/risk/followup 文本。
summary.why: 当前 go run . eval run --json 的 2/8 失败来自测量口径漂移：Mainline 已经把 durable action signals 从 seal summary 字段迁移到 constraint.added / risk.added / followup.added 事件，但 eval 仍要求 retrieval 返回 legacy anti_patterns。先修正测量口径，才能判断 retrieval 是否真实回归。
summary.user_goal: 迁移 eval fixture 到 explicit signal 模型

decisions.chose: 用 ExpectedSignal{kind, match} 代替 AntiPatternMatch，并让 scorer 只检查 explicit constraint/risk/followup。
decisions.rationale: legacy summary.anti_patterns 是历史读取字段，不再是默认 pre-edit action signal；eval 不能继续把旧字段当作硬规则来源。

decisions.point: 硬规则 fixture 表达方式
decisions.chose: 把 OAuth、billing boundary、test discipline、terminology、parser signature 这些长期硬规则 seed 成 high severity explicit constraints。
decisions.rationale: 当前 agent context 通过 inherited_constraints 暴露人类确认的硬规则，且只传播 high severity file-overlap constraints。

decisions.chose: 为 fixture 增加 TaskFiles；有 TaskFiles 时用 files mode 加 query text，没有文件目标时保留 query mode。
decisions.rationale: explicit inherited constraints 依赖文件重叠，file-targeted retrieval 更接近 agent 在具体改动前看到硬规则的路径。

decisions.chose: 继续用 retrieval status 与 decision lineage 作为期望，不强行制造 explicit constraint。
decisions.rationale: 这些场景的负面信号来自生命周期和替代关系，而不是所有历史教训都应该升级成硬 guard。

rejected.alternative: 恢复 legacy anti_patterns 的默认检索和 scorer 口径
rejected.reason: 这会反转 explicit signal redesign 的边界，把 seal prose 重新变成未来 agent 的 action signal。

rejected.alternative: 在未迁移 fixture 前直接修 retrieval
rejected.reason: 当前失败原因是 eval 仍检查旧合同；先改 retrieval 会掩盖真正的合同漂移。

review_notes: 验证：go run . eval run --json 返回 passed=8 failed=0 skipped=0 all_passed=true。
本次没有新增 durable Mainline guard/risk/followup；只是把 eval fixture seed 和 scorer 期望迁移到现有 explicit signal 模型。

architectural_claims: Eval Layer 1 now treats explicit signal records as the durable action-signal source and keeps legacy anti_patterns out of active expectations.
Fixture file targets are part of the eval substrate because explicit inherited constraints are exposed through file overlap.
behavioral_changes: go run . eval run --json scores explicit constraints/status instead of legacy anti_patterns and returns 8/8 for the embedded catalog.
Fixture retrieval uses files mode when TaskFiles are present, preserving query text for relevance while allowing inherited constraints to surface.
docs/eval-results.md now records the 2026-05-24 explicit-signal Layer 1 baseline and explains the prior 2/8 as contract drift.

data_model_changes.name: internal/eval.SeedConstraint / SeedRisk / SeedFollowup / ExpectedSignal / RetrievalInput
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Internal eval fixture model only; all in-repo callers and fixtures were migrated in this change.

migration_notes: External code importing internal/eval must replace AntiPatternMatch expectations with ExpectedSignal and implement Retriever.Retrieve instead of RetrieveByQuery.
